pi_items.verified_value: U.S. Life Cycle Inventory Database from NREL (National Renewable Energy Laboratory), maintained by the U.S. Department of Energy, distributed via Federal LCA Commons (FLCAC)
pi_items.source: Verified via NREL.gov and FLCAC official documentation
Task involves GUI interaction, database manipulation, and CSV generation

privileged_info_summary: This task uses the real USLCI (U.S. Life Cycle Inventory) database from NREL, a public dataset of production-based LCA data for U.S. manufacturing processes. The three location coordinates are verified geographic centers of U.S. states: California (36.778°N, -119.418°W), Texas (31.969°N, -99.902°W), and Ohio (40.417°N, -82.907°W). These coordinates will be used to tag three different manufacturing processes from the USLCI database and exported to a CSV report. The task operates on real, non-synthetic data from the National Renewable Energy Laboratory.
